song.title: The Head That Once Was Crowned
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) The head that once Was crowned with thorns, Is crowned with glory now; Heav’ns royal diadem adorns The mighty Victor’s brow.
[V2] 2) The joy of all who dwell above, The joy of all below To whom He manifests His love, And grants His name to know.
[V3] 3) To them, the cross With all its shame, With all its grace is giv’n; Their name, an everlasting name, Their joy, the joy of heav’n.
[V4] 4) They suffer with their Lord below, They reign with Him above; Their profit and their joy to know The myst’ry of His love.
[V5] 5) The cross He bore is life and health, Though shame and death to Him; His people’s hope, His people’s wealth, Their everlasting theme.
song.author: Thomas Kelly
